author: Rook (Claude Opus 4.7, Cowork background session)
purpose: Per-faction silhouette discipline values. Consumed by UArchonFactionSilhouetteLibrary so future procedural mesh generators, UMG body-picker widgets, and capsule-based debug actors all read one source of truth. The discipline rule is: a player at 30m must identify faction by silhouette alone, before color, before label.

capsule_baseline.note: Engine default Unreal capsule. All faction multipliers scale from this.

VerdantChoir.silhouette_summary: Vertical bias + asymmetric upper-body cap (quiver/bramble) + rounded organic top. Reads as 'grown-tall, asymmetric, organic' at 30m.

LenswrightCompact.shoulder_protrusion_purpose: crossbow mount silhouette — Lenswright unit ID at 30m IS the crossbow profile
LenswrightCompact.silhouette_summary: Wide hunched base (1.2x lower-radius), right-shoulder crossbow protrusion, reflective head-lens sphere. Reads as 'anchored, mechanical, watching' at 30m.

KinwildCovenant.silhouette_summary: Forward-leaning 10° + cloak mantle + beast companion at the unit's right hip. Reads as 'in motion, hunt-bound, paired' at 30m.

hero_overlay.purpose: Heroes are always recognizable at any distance — 1.15x silhouette + faction-accent ground ring decal beneath them.

VerdantOutpost.shape_summary: tall central spire + 4 low encircling walls

LenswrightOutpost.shape_summary: wide low building + 2 corner turret cylinders

KinwildEncampment.shape_summary: low tent cluster (3 angled cones) + central fire-pit cylinder

CentralSplitrootTree.shape_summary: tall central trunk + 3 above-ground root knee-walls splitting toward each faction homeland; map centerpiece visible from every base outer choke

remix_rule: Future games swap the per-faction multipliers + mantle types + companion shapes. The 6-mantle-type enum, the capsule-baseline + multiplier pattern, the hero-overlay (scale + ring decal) substrate, and the building-as-faction-shape discipline are SUBSTRATE.
